title: [$250] Show 'Scanning' date and sort scanning receipts to top of expenses list

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Improvement
labels.description: Item broken or needs improvement.

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

body:
When a user scans a receipt from the expenses page, the newly scanning expense gets a default date of "00:00:00 UTC today", which causes it to appear buried beneath other expenses created later that day. Users expect the scanning receipt to appear at the top of the list so they can easily track it. ## Proposed Solution Show "Scanning" instead of the date for scanning receipts, and sort them to the top of the expenses list. No backend changes needed — the display and sort are purely frontend concerns. ### 1. Show "Scanning" instead of the date There's already a precedent — the merchant column does exactly this at [`TransactionItemRow/index.tsx:159-161`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/d166392bc802b639bed97d96343a279a3619ec6f/src/components/TransactionItemRow/index.tsx#L159-L161): ```ts if (isScanning(transactionItem) && shouldShowMerchant) { merchant = translate('iou.receiptStatusTitle'); } ``` Apply the same pattern for the date column at the two `DateCell` call sites: - **Wide layout:** [`TransactionItemRow/index.tsx:326`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/d166392bc802b639bed97d96343a279a3619ec6f/src/components/TransactionItemRow/index.tsx#L326) — pass `translate('iou.receiptStatusTitle')` instead of `createdAt` when `isScanning(transactionItem)` is true - **Narrow layout:** [`TransactionItemRow/index.tsx:736`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/d166392bc802b639bed97d96343a279a3619ec6f/src/components/TransactionItemRow/index.tsx#L736) — same change [`DateCell.tsx`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/d166392bc802b639bed97d96343a279a3619ec6f/src/components/Search/SearchList/ListItem/DateCell.tsx) would need a small tweak to skip date formatting when the value isn't a real date (or accept a `displayText` override prop). ### 2. Sort scanning receipts to top Add scanning-priority logic in the two sort locations, **before** the normal `compareValues` call: - **Search/expenses list:** [`SearchUIUtils.ts` (`getSortedTransactionData`)](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/d166392bc802b639bed97d96343a279a3619ec6f/src/libs/SearchUIUtils.ts#L3590) — inside the `.sort()` callback, check `isScanning(a)` / `isScanning(b)` first. If one is scanning and the other isn't, return the scanning one first (regardless of sort direction). - **Report transaction list:** [`MoneyRequestReportTransactionList.tsx:286`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/d166392bc802b639bed97d96343a279a3619ec6f/src/components/MoneyRequestReportView/MoneyRequestReportTransactionList.tsx#L286) — same wrapper logic around `compareValues`. ### 3. No backend changes needed The `created` date stays as today's date (no fake future dates). [`isScanning`](https://github.com/Expensify/App/blob/d166392bc802b639bed97d96343a279a3619ec6f/src/libs/TransactionUtils/index.ts#L1403-L1415) already detects the scanning state from `receipt.state`, and once SmartScan completes, `isScanning` returns false and the expense reverts to normal date display + sort position automatically. --- **Parent issue:** https://github.com/Expensify/Expensify/issues/630432

Login with the teacher account that was referred 2. Navigate to Profile settings 3. Click on Save the World 4. Click on "I am a teacher" 5. Fill the I'm a teacher form - in the principal field enter the account that referred the teacher 6. Verify a workspace chat has been created > Check members Result: Principal is a member in the WS 7. body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:**v9.3.68-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Y **Reproducible in production?:** Y **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** No **Issue reported by:** SRAM **Slack conversation** (hyperlinked to channel name): [#expensify-bugs](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C049HHMV9SM/p1778153926921989) ## Action Performed: - User has the `Auditor` role - User has reports to approve on a workspace that is past the billing grace period. 1. Click on `Approve` 2. Observe the NotFound page ## Expected Result: The user should see the restriction action page with the variation that is shown to `user`. ## Actual Result: The [code for this page](https://github.com/callstack-internal/Expensify-App/blob/b1ba0a22318f9b9f96ea5e284ac61ea5829fcf6b/src/pages/RestrictedAction/Workspace/WorkspaceRestrictedActionPage.tsx#L85-L100) only evaluates `Owner`, `Admin`, `User` roles. So a user with the `Auditor` role hits a 404 NotFound page. ## Workaround: Can the user still use Expensify without this being fixed? Have you informed them of the workaround? ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos In-line above. If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.68-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/test-runs/TR-26107/folder/13176677/41236545/1395678671 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** lekima20+655405@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Win 11/Chrome **App Component:** Other ## Action Performed: 1. Open https://staging.new.expensify.com 2. Enter an email that hasn’t been registered yet and Join 3. At "What do you want to do today?" select "Track and budget expenses" 4. Enter any name 5. Click on Continue button two or three or four times 6. At Inbox click on Concierge chat 7. Log out and repeat step 1 to 5 if the task on Concierge not display duplicated ## Expected Result: The tasks on Concierge should be displayed without duplication ## Actual Result: After clicking on "Continue" button more than 1 time, the task on Concierge RHP may briefly display as duplicated, or the task may remain duplicated permanently on Concierge chat ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/42377dec-7062-4238-b1dd-56afb02793ae [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

title: [$250] Add "Download as PDF" option to Reports page bulk actions dropdown (single-select)

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: NewFeature
labels.description: Something to build that is a new item.

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

body:
**DesignDoc:** https://docs.google.com/document/d/1KYHRz5ywjemCPhULDpBgQCvdn8YfqCMjixbfdjNS8Os/edit?usp=sharing **Description:** Add a "Download as PDF" entry to the bulk actions dropdown on the Reports page. When a single report is selected, tapping it triggers the existing `exportReportToPDF` flow (same as the three-dot menu on the report details page). When multiple reports are selected, the option should be hidden or disabled (multi-select is a follow-up). **Acceptance criteria:** 1. "Download as PDF" appears in the bulk actions dropdown when one report is selected 2. Tapping it downloads the report as a PDF (reuses exportReportToPDF + ReportPDFDownloadModal) 3. The option is not available when multiple reports are selected 4. If the user is offline, the offline modal is shown (same guard as the "Export" option) **Reference:** Existing implementation: `src/hooks/useExportActions.ts` — CONST.REPORT.SECONDARY_ACTIONS.DOWNLOAD_PDF Dropdown to modify: `src/hooks/useSearchBulkActions.ts` Translation: `common.downloadAsPDF`
